Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 22, 2026

1. Overview

PocketBurrito ("we", "us") is a tech product recommendation site. This policy explains what data we collect and how we use it.

2. Information We Collect

PocketBurrito is a static website. We do not require accounts, logins, or personal information. We may collect:

  • Standard web server logs (IP address, browser type, pages visited)
  • Analytics data through privacy-respecting tools

3. Amazon Associates Program

PocketBurrito is a participant in the Amazon Associates Program, an affiliate advertising program designed to provide a means for sites to earn advertising fees by linking to Amazon.ca. When you click an affiliate link and make a purchase, we may earn a commission at no additional cost to you.

4. Cookies

We use minimal cookies for basic site functionality. Amazon may set cookies when you visit product pages through our affiliate links. These cookies are governed by Amazon's Privacy Policy.

5. Third-Party Links

Our site contains links to Amazon.ca and other external websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those sites. We encourage you to read their privacy policies.

6. Changes

We may update this policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

7. Contact

Questions? Reach out on Twitter at @TechinSeconds.

🌯 PocketBurrito

Your pocket-sized guide to the best tech deals, gadgets, and product recommendations on Amazon.ca.

Affiliate Disclosure: As an Amazon Associate, PocketBurrito earns from qualifying purchases. Prices are accurate at the time of publication and subject to change. We only recommend products we genuinely believe provide value.
